summary: Frontend UI redesign verification for Om Patel portfolio. All 12 requested features verified on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). Layout, copy, mailto, sections, and no-gradient headline all match spec. No horizontal page overflow on mobile.

issues: Contact card values use Tailwind 'truncate' which cuts email/phone/linkedin strings on 390px width (e.g. email shows ellipsis). Underlying href is correct, but visible text is clipped. Consider break-all or smaller text on mobile instead of truncate.

action_items: Optional polish: replace 'truncate' with 'break-all' (or reduce padding) on contact card values so email/phone/linkedin are fully readable on mobile widths.
critical_code_review_comments: hero-image resolved src is /YOUR-REPO-NAME/static/media/... — this appears to be an odd PUBLIC_URL/homepage config in package.json ('YOUR-REPO-NAME'). Image still loads under the preview URL, but this is a leaky placeholder that should be cleaned up before production deployment.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Redesign verified: brand shows 'Om Patel' (no OM_P.), no 'View Pipeline' button, hero uses hero-om-converted.jpg (3024x4032) inside circular avatar, headline has no gradient (backgroundImage: none, solid color #F2F2F2), tagline 'Data Engineer · Analytics · DevOps' present, contact phrase 'Got data stuck and need to have it transformed with analytics?' present with orange/beige highlights, education and certifications live as separate <section> containers with distinct ids, resume mailto -> patelomr07@gmail.com. Mobile 390px: documentElement scrollWidth == clientWidth (no page overflow); only two P.truncate elements inside contact card intentionally truncate (design suggestion above).
